---
title: errorf
description: "Replace errors.New around fmt.Sprintf."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Replace errors.New around fmt.Sprintf. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
errors.New(fmt.Sprintf("load %s", name))
```

## Good

```go
fmt.Errorf("load %s", name)
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only errorf`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
